{{CargoRelic
|name=Causality
|rank=SS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=09-14
|source=Fragment Crafting (3.9%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.14%)
|description=On Sep 14, 2018 AD, someone used the theory of causality and predicted the Lightning Fighter accident.

Before the plane crashed, he predicted with the law of causality, which takes into account all the potential factors, that the plane would crash. Any state of motion is a collective result of its previous state. In other words, instead of thinking that the world operates according to cause and effect, we actually see the world through cause and effect.

[Laws of Causality]

There is no effect without a cause. As an objective phenomenon, the variety of causes determines the complexity of effects.
|fame=65
|art=63
|fth=66
|civ=48
|tech=105
|ss1=Mecha Gene Research SPD +1.2%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +12m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Mecha Gene Research SPD +1.8%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +18m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Mecha Gene Research SPD +2.4%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +24m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +8<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Mecha Gene Research SPD +3.6%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +36m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +12<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss5=Mecha Gene Research SPD +4.8%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +48m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +16<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss6=Mecha Gene Research SPD +6.6%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +1h 6m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +22<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Mecha Gene Research SPD +6.6%<br>Free Research Speedup (Mecha) +1h 6m<br>Per 5 Mecha Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +22<br>Mecha Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Free Gene Speedup (Mecha) +1h (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, 2x Orange Card Drops +15%
|skill2=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Mecha Cells gained +15%
|skill3=[[File:Arena skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail RUSH +600
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Mecha Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Gene Boost]]
[[Category:Cathay Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Cathay Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Wonder Fungus Output]]
[[Category:Time Chest Output]]
[[Category:Rewards Wish Coin]]
